de.dhbw.memory.model

Package
Description
de.dhbw.memory.controller
 
de.dhbw.memory.model

de.dhbw.memory.view.dialog
 
  • Classes in de.dhbw.memory.model used by de.dhbw.memory.controller
    Class
    Description
    FlipResult
    Outcome returned by Game.flip(int) so the controller knows how to react.
    Game
    Core game logic: tracks players, the active player, flipped cards, and turn count.
    Theme
    Available card themes.
  • Classes in de.dhbw.memory.model used by de.dhbw.memory.model
    Class
    Description
    Board
    The game board: a flat list of cards whose index represents the grid position shown in the UI.
    Card
    A single memory card with a unique id, a motif shared with its pair, and mutable state.
    FlipResult
    Outcome returned by Game.flip(int) so the controller knows how to react.
    Player
    Represents a player participating in the game, identified by name and tracked by score.
    Theme
    Available card themes.

    Class
    Description
    Card
    A single memory card with a unique id, a motif shared with its pair, and mutable state.
    Theme
    Available card themes.
